themes.spacing_and_layout: Strict grid hierarchy, compact padding (p-4 to p-6). Borders use max 4px radius.
themes.card_designs: Flat white background, 1px solid slate border, no shadow.
themes.button_styles: Solid primary color, sharp corners, high contrast.
themes.visual_examples: Resembles enterprise financial software, emphasizing data density, tables, and clear separation.
themes.recommendation: Best for official syndicates prioritizing formal operations and document management.

themes.spacing_and_layout: Spacious padding (p-6 to p-8), moderate border radius (8px - 12px).
themes.card_designs: White surfaces with soft diffuse ambient shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1).
themes.button_styles: Rounded-lg corners, vibrant solid color with subtle hover lift.
themes.visual_examples: Looks like a fast-growing SaaS startup dashboard. Friendly, bright, and engaging.
themes.recommendation: Best if the union wants to attract younger members with a modern tech platform feel.

themes.spacing_and_layout: Maximum negative space (p-8 to p-12). Wide margins, minimal borders.
themes.card_designs: Cardless approach or faint backgrounds without borders. Focus on typography.
themes.button_styles: Minimalist outline buttons or subtle gray ghost buttons.
themes.visual_examples: Like an art gallery or high-end architectural firm. Calming and distraction-free.
themes.recommendation: Great for unions focusing on arts, culture, or specialized professional services.

themes.spacing_and_layout: Cozy spacing, fully rounded corners (16px to full pill shape).
themes.card_designs: Soft tinted backgrounds (e.g., pale green or warm sand), soft ambient shadows.
themes.button_styles: Pill-shaped, earthy colors, soft hover transitions.
themes.visual_examples: Reminiscent of healthcare, wellness, or community-focused platforms.
themes.recommendation: Perfect for labor unions where community, support, and care are central.

global_guidelines.rtl_implementation: Crucial: Implement dir='rtl'. Use logical CSS classes like ms-, me-, ps-, pe-, start-, end- instead of left/right.
global_guidelines.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Clean Professional' as the default theme if the user hasn't explicitly chosen one. Implement with React, Tailwind CSS (logical properties), and shadcn/ui.
